operationName: Operation Swords of Iron (Israel) / October 7 War
heroHeadline: Houthis Launch Third Missile Barrage at Israel on Passover; Hezbollah Rockets Northern Israel; Gaza Faces Famine by Mid-April
heroSubtitle: Houthis fired their third ballistic missile at Israel since March 30 as Passover began April 1; Hezbollah struck northern Israel on March 31 (3 light injuries); Gaza faces renewed famine by mid-April as all land crossings remain closed since Feb 28; cumulative Gaza death toll stands at 72,285 with 680+ killed since Oct 2025 ceasefire; 2026 Flash Appeal 93% unfunded
footerNote: Data sourced from IDF, Hamas, UN OCHA, UNRWA, WHO, ICJ, ICC, Times of Israel, and Haaretz. Gaza death toll: 72,285+ confirmed killed since Oct 7, 2023 (Gaza Ministry of Health / WAFA, Mar 31 2026). ICC arrest warrants issued for Netanyahu and Gallant (Nov 2024). Board of Peace established Jan 2026 under UN Resolution 2803. UNDP shipments suspended Mar 25, 2026 after contraband discovery. Lancet Mortality Survey: 75,200 violent deaths through Jan 5, 2025. Houthis resumed missile attacks on Israel March 30 (first since Oct 2025 ceasefire) — third barrage April 1 claimed jointly with Iran and Hezbollah. Hezbollah fired rockets at northern Israel March 31 (3 light injuries). UN OCHA warns famine could return to Gaza by mid-April 2026 if crossings remain closed.
